scripts.check:registry: node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('./keys/registry.json','utf8')); const TEST_KEY='/PjT+j342wWZypb0m/4MSBsFhHrrqzpoTe2rZ9hf0XU='; if(r.keys.some(k=>k.public_key===TEST_KEY)){console.error('ERROR: registry.json contains test key — replace before deployment');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('OK: no test keys found')}"
